yaml.title: Contact – LEMA Lab
yaml.description: Contact and recruiting information for LEMA Lab at the National University of Singapore.

markdown.markdown: ::: {.box} Due to the high volume of inquiries, I may not be able to respond to every message. If you believe you are a strong fit and do not receive a reply within one week, you may follow up by email using the subject line "NUS-LEMA Application | [Expected Role] | [Current Affiliation]". Our lab has openings for 3–6 PhD students, 1 postdoc fellow, and several visiting students in 2027. Please submit the application form first, including a CV, research interests, and links to representative work. [Application Form](https://forms.office.com/r/xrW0nmy1Gi?origin=lprLink){.btn-app} ::: ::: {.box-grid-3} ::: {.box} ### PhD Students For PhD applicants, please also follow the [NUS CS PhD application process](https://www.comp.nus.edu.sg/programmes/pg/phdcs/application/#deadline) by June 15 (spring intake) or Dec 15 (fall intake). ::: ::: {.box} ### Postdoc Researchers For postdoc applicants, please include a CV, representative papers, reference contacts, and possible project directions. ::: ::: {.box} ### Research Interns For internship or visiting applicants, please include an expected timeline, funding status, and research interests. ::: ::: ## Fellowship Resources ::: {.hero} ### For Graduate Sudents - [Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)](https://www.nsfgrfp.org/), National Science Foundation - [Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)](https://www.krellinst.org/csgf/), Department of Energy - [Office of Science Graduate Student Research (SCGSR) Program](https://science.osti.gov/wdts/scgsr), Department of Energy - [National Defense Science and Engineering Graduate (NDSEG) Fellowship](https://ndseg.sysplus.com/), Department of Defense - [SMART Scholarship Program, Department of Defense](https://ndseg.sysplus.com/), Department of Defense - [NASA Space Technology Graduate Research Opportunities (NSTGRO)](https://www.nasa.gov/nasa-space-technology-graduate-research-opportunities-nstgro/), National Aeronautics and Space Administration ### For Underraduate Sudents - [Research Experiences for Undergraduates (REU)](https://www.nsf.gov/funding/initiatives/reu), National Science Foundation ::: ## Why Join Us ::: {.box-grid} ::: {.box} ### Lab Research Our recent work has been recognized with Best Paper awards at ICLR, CVPR, and RSS workshops, Oral at ICML, and invited talks at UC Berkeley, OpenAI, NVIDIA, etc. ::: ::: {.box} ### Global Collaboration Our lab builds on broad collaborations across NUS and with researchers at leading institutions worldwide, including Stanford, Harvard, ETHZ, EPFL, MPI, Tsinghua, ISTA, Oxford, and beyond. ::: ::: {.box} ### NUS AI Research NUS is consistently recognized among the leading computer science programs, ranked globally at #4 by QS, #5 by US News, and #13 by Times in recent subject rankings. ::: ::: {.box} ### Singapore AI Hub Singapore is emerging as a global AI hub, with growing activity from Google DeepMind, Microsoft Research, and other leading industry labs, creating strong opportunities for research careers. ::: ::: ## Who We Look For ::: {.box-grid} ::: {.box} ### Minimum Qualifications - Uncompromising intellectual honesty and research integrity. - Strong background in machine learning, robot learning, computer vision, robotics, physics, or related areas. - Good written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain ideas clearly and collaborate effectively. ::: ::: {.box} ### Preferred Qualifications - Intrinsic curiosity and genuine interest in fundamental research. - Independent thinking, ownership, and a demonstrated record of initiative or exceptional achievement. - Evidence of substantial prior research experience, such as high-quality publications or submissions in relevant venues. ::: ::: ::: {.box .contact-box} **Email:** liuyj [at] comp.nus.edu.sg **Address:** COM 1, 13 Computing Drive, Singapore 117417 ::: ## ::: {.text-center style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#111; margin-top:2rem;"} © 2026 EMC2 Lab. All rights reserved. :::
